query_normalized: assessing energy consumption of llm inference for code completion computer science
rationale: The paper provides a foundational framework and baseline metrics for measuring LLM inference energy consumption (energy‑per‑token, Joules/token), which directly addresses the same dependent variable (energy use) in the same domain (LLM inference) as the user's question, even though it does not focus specifically on code completion. This satisfies criterion (b) (independent variable on the same domain) and (d) (foundational methodology).
